title: Moses / Musa
similarities: Moses confronts tyranny and leads deliverance.
He receives divine revelation and law.
Signs and wonders authenticate his mission.

differences.description: The Torah presents an extended continuous Moses cycle across multiple books.
The Qur’an retells Moses episodes in multiple surahs for moral reflection in varied contexts.

commentary_notes: Moses is one of the most cross-referenced figures across all three traditions.
A future view could align legal themes with Sinai and post-Sinai reception history.

citations.note: Primary passage anchor for this node.
Primary Qur’anic passage anchor for this node.

alignment_rows.summary: Core references for aligned reading in this draft.
